info.name: CMMS Platform API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for the CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System) Platform backend. Server runs on http://localhost:8000

request.description: Login and receive JWT access token. Rate limited to 15 requests per 15 minutes.
Create new user (requires ADMIN_ROLES: super_admin, org_admin)

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Updated Organization Name",
    "description": "Updated description",
    "address": "456 New St",
    "owner_name": "New Owner",
    "website_url": "https://newsite.com",
    "email": "newcontact@example.com",
    "phone": "+0987654321"
}

{
    "name": "New Site",
    "address": "123 Site St",
    "city": "New York",
    "state": "NY",
    "zip_code": "10001",
    "country": "USA",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "description": "Site description",
    "is_active": true,
    "manager_id": "{{userId}}",
    "org_id": "{{orgId}}"
}

{

    "purchase_cost": "1500.00",
    "warranty_expiry": "2026-01-15",
    "status": "active",
    "org_id": "{{orgId}}"
}

request.description: Create work order (ALL_WO_ROLES: super_admin, org_admin, facility_manager, technician, requestor)

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Updated Work Order Title",
    "description": "Updated description",
    "priority": "high",
    "status": "in_progress",
    "location": "Building B",
    "scheduled_start": "2024-03-02T09:00:00Z",
    "scheduled_end": "2024-03-02T17:00:00Z",
    "estimated_hours": 6,
    "actual_hours": 2,
    "notes": "Work started, additional parts needed"
}

request.description: Update work order status (MANAGER_ROLES + TECHNICIAN). Status enum: new, open, in_progress, on_hold, pending_review, completed, cancelled
Add comment to work order (MANAGER_ROLES + TECHNICIAN)
Get used parts for work order
Add inventory usage to work order (MANAGER_ROLES + TECHNICIAN)
Remove inventory usage from work order (MANAGER_ROLES + TECHNICIAN)
Add image attachments to work order (MANAGER_ROLES + TECHNICIAN). Multipart upload, max 3 images.
Get current user's requests (any authenticated user)
Get work orders trend (requires analytics:view permission)
Get work orders by site (requires analytics:view permission)
Get work orders by category (requires analytics:view permission)
Get workload by day (requires analytics:view permission)
Get preventive vs reactive ratio (requires analytics:view permission)
Get estimated vs actual hours (requires analytics:view permission)
Get average resolution time (requires analytics:view permission)
Get PM schedule status (requires analytics:view permission)
Get top used inventory parts (requires analytics:view permission)
Get inventory by category (requires analytics:view permission)
Get inventory cost trend (requires analytics:view permission)
Get users by role (requires analytics:view permission)
Get site technician counts (requires analytics:view permission)
Smart create work order using AI (any authenticated user)
Get latest work orders by site/location (any authenticated user)
Health check endpoint. Returns database status, uptime, and memory usage. Public endpoint.
